examples.title: Basic Default Arguments
examples.description: Demonstrates basic usage of default function arguments in C++
examples.explanation: Shows how default arguments work - missing arguments from right are filled with defaults

examples.title: Default Arguments with Constructors
examples.description: Shows how default arguments are used with constructors
examples.explanation: Default arguments in constructors allow flexible object creation

examples.title: Default Arguments vs Function Overloading
examples.description: Compares default arguments with function overloading approach
examples.explanation: Shows two approaches: single function with defaults vs multiple overloaded functions

examples.title: Error: Default Arguments in Definition
examples.description: Demonstrates compilation error when defaults are in both declaration and definition
examples.explanation: This code produces compilation error showing that defaults should only be in declaration

examples.title: Practical Example: String Processing
examples.description: Real-world example of default arguments for string operations
examples.explanation: Practical demonstration showing default arguments in real-world function design
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) where n is string length
